_source: gin7 manual page image .omo/work/manual-pages-101/page024.png (printed footer '23') + verbatim text layer .omo/work/manual-pages-101/uncovered-texts.json key '24'
_confidence_notes: Text layer key '24' carries printed footer page number '23' (text-layer index runs one ahead of printed page).
Page covers ④ 操艦パネル (flagship energy allocation, 6 channels) and the start of ⑤ システムアイコン (情報アイコン: 7 information windows).
No numeric values (total energy amount, allocation steps, ranges, recovery rates, speeds) appear on this page; only qualitative rules. None invented.

WARP: page states withdrawal REQUIRES warp allocation, and MAX allocation enables withdrawal from outside the tactical-map circle (円外から撤退). Whether non-max allocation permits withdrawal from inside the circle is not stated on this page.
SHIELD: '4方向に対応したシールド回復力' — recovery of shield lost to hits (被弾により減少した分); per-direction split mechanics beyond '4 directions' not detailed here.
情報ウィンドウ list is verbatim: キャラクター情報/旗艦情報/戦隊情報/部隊情報/惑星要塞情報/国家情報/地形情報 の7種類 (text layer shows 'キャラク/ター情報' split across a line break).

flagshipControlPanel.description: Operating this panel changes the energy allocation to your own flagship (自分の旗艦に対するエネルギーの振り分け).

totalEnergyRule.term: 総エネルギー量は限られています
totalEnergyRule.ko: 총 에너지량은 한정되어 있어 상황에 따라 배분이 필요
totalEnergyRule.rule: Total energy amount is fixed/limited; reallocation among channels is required per situation.

channels.effect: 主にレーザー兵器の出力を変更 — mainly changes laser-weapon output.
channels.raiseAllocation: 攻撃力の増加やエネルギー充填速度の短縮 — increases attack power and shortens energy charge (recharge) time.

channels.effect: 主にガン兵器の出力を変更 — mainly changes gun-weapon output.
channels.raiseAllocation: 攻撃力を高める — raises attack power.

channels.effect: 旗艦の4方向に対応したシールド回復力を変更 — changes shield recovery power corresponding to the flagship's 4 directions.
channels.raiseAllocation: 振り分けた部分は、被弾により減少した分のシールドを回復 — allocated portion recovers shield reduced by taking hits.

channels.effect: 戦術ゲーム中の移動速度を変更 — changes movement speed during the tactical game.
戦術ゲームからの撤退に必要 — required for withdrawal (retreat) from the tactical game.
channels.maxAllocation: 最大値を割り振る事で、戦術ゲームマップの円外から撤退を行う事が出来ます — allocating the maximum value enables withdrawal from outside the tactical-map circle (円外).

channels.effect: 戦術ゲームにおける索敵力が変更 — changes detection (索敵) power in the tactical game.
channels.raiseAllocation: より遠くのユニットの発見率が上がります — discovery rate of more distant units rises.

systemIcons.description: ゲームの基本的な操作を行うボタン — buttons for basic game operations.

informationIcon.action: 左クリックで情報ウィンドウを表示 — left click displays an information window.

_mining_notes: 비워둔/명시 없음 항목: (1) 총 에너지량의 수치 — 페이지에 '総エネルギー量は限られています'만 있고 값 명시 없음(totalAmountValue=null). (2) 각 채널의 배분 단계/최소·최대 수치, 공격력·충전속도·회복량·이동속도·색적거리의 구체 수치 — 전부 명시 없음. (3) WARP 비최대 배분 시 원(円) 안에서의 철퇴 가능 여부 — 명시 없음(최대 배분=원 밖 철퇴만 명시). (4) SHIELD 4방향의 방향별 개별 배분 방식 상세 — '4方向に対応した'까지만 명시. (5) 시스템 아이콘의 정보 아이콘 외 다른 버튼들 — 이 페이지 범위 밖(다음 페이지). OCR 불확실: 텍스트 레이어에서 'キャラクター情報'가 'キャラク/ター情報'로 줄바꿈 분할되어 있으나 7종 목록·개수(7種類)와 정합하므로 확실. 텍스트 레이어 키 '24' = 인쇄 페이지 번호 23.
